channel.title: Journal of Inverse and Ill-posed Problems
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Inverse and Ill-posed Problems

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Muvasharkhan T. Jenaliyev, Sergey I. Kabanikhin, Medina Kassen, Madi G. Yergaliyev DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jiip-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Determination of lower order perturbations of a polyharmonic operator in two dimensions
item.description: Article by Muvasharkhan T. Jenaliyev, Sergey I. Kabanikhin, Medina Kassen, Madi G. Yergaliyev DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jiip-2023-0067

item.title: About the supports in the Fredholm convolution
item.description: Article by Muvasharkhan T. Jenaliyev, Sergey I. Kabanikhin, Medina Kassen, Madi G. Yergaliyev DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jiip-2024-0015

item.title: An a priori method for estimating the informativeness of the configuration of sensor placement when solving inverse problems of remote sensing
item.description: Article by Muvasharkhan T. Jenaliyev, Sergey I. Kabanikhin, Medina Kassen, Madi G. Yergaliyev DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jiip-2024-0017

item.title: A coefficient identification problem for a system of advection-diffusion-reaction equations in water quality modeling
item.description: Article by Muvasharkhan T. Jenaliyev, Sergey I. Kabanikhin, Medina Kassen, Madi G. Yergaliyev DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jiip-2024-0030

item.title: Inverse problems for the eigenparameter Dirac operator with complex weight
item.description: Article by Muvasharkhan T. Jenaliyev, Sergey I. Kabanikhin, Medina Kassen, Madi G. Yergaliyev DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jiip-2024-0032

item.title: Recovery analysis for the ℓ p /ℓ1 minimization problem
item.description: Article by Muvasharkhan T. Jenaliyev, Sergey I. Kabanikhin, Medina Kassen, Madi G. Yergaliyev DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jiip-2024-0044

item.title: Approximate recovery of the Sturm–Liouville problem on a half-line from the Weyl function
item.description: Article by Muvasharkhan T. Jenaliyev, Sergey I. Kabanikhin, Medina Kassen, Madi G. Yergaliyev DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jiip-2024-0066

item.title: On the solvability of an inverse problem for the Burgers equation with an integral overdetermination condition in a nonlinearly degenerating domain
item.description: Article by Muvasharkhan T. Jenaliyev, Sergey I. Kabanikhin, Medina Kassen, Madi G. Yergaliyev DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jiip-2024-0067
